issue_title: wrong result of SUM subquery results
issue_body:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
init by following sql:
```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `table_int_float_varchar`, table_int_varchar;
CREATE TABLE `table_int_float_varchar` (
  `id_6` int(16) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `col_int_6` int(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `col_float_6` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `col_varchar_6` varchar(511) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id_6`)
);

INSERT INTO `table_int_float_varchar` VALUES (14,1,NULL,'0000-00-00 00:00:00'),(15,1,NULL,'NULL'),(16,1,1.5,NULL),(17,65535,NULL,' '),(18,-1,-0.1,'0'),(19,NULL,-0.1,'2020-02-02 02:02:00'),(20,1,0,NULL),(21,0,NULL,'NULL'),(22,-1,1.5,'0'),(23,-1,NULL,NULL),(24,1,NULL,'0');

CREATE TABLE `table_int_varchar` (
  `id_4` int(16) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `col_int_4` int(16) DEFAULT NULL,
  `col_varchar_4` varchar(511) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id_4`)
);

INSERT INTO `table_int_varchar` VALUES (1,-1,'false'),(2,65535,NULL),(3,1,'-1'),(4,0,'NULL'),(5,1,'-0'),(6,0,'-0'),(7,65535,' '),(8,-1,'true'),(9,0,'0'),(10,NULL,'1'),(11,0,'-0'),(12,NULL,'false'),(13,NULL,'2020-02-02 02:02:00'),(14,1,NULL),(15,NULL,NULL),(16,NULL,NULL),(17,NULL,'0'),(18,1,NULL);


SELECT count(1) FROM table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL WHERE (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL;

SELECT sum(tmp_col) FROM (SELECT (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL AS tmp_col FROM (table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL)) AS tmp_table;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
execute in mysql:
```bash
mysql> SELECT count(1) FROM table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL WHERE (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL;
+----------+
| count(1) |
+----------+
|       18 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.05 sec)

mysql> SELECT sum(tmp_col) FROM (SELECT (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL AS tmp_col FROM (table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL)) AS tmp_table;
+--------------+
| sum(tmp_col) |
+--------------+
|           18 |
+--------------+
1 row in set (0.05 sec)
```
the two SQLs are equivalent, so the results should be same
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
in tidb:
```bash
mysql> SELECT count(1) FROM table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL WHERE (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL;
+----------+
| count(1) |
+----------+
|        0 |
+----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> SELECT sum(tmp_col) FROM (SELECT (tmp2.col_float_6 OR "") IS NULL AS tmp_col FROM (table_int_varchar AS tmp1 LEFT JOIN table_int_float_varchar AS tmp2 ON (0e+00>=tmp2.id_6) IS NULL)) AS tmp_table;
+--------------+
| sum(tmp_col) |
+--------------+
|           18 |
+--------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```
### 4. Affected version (Required)

<!-- v3.0.0, v4.0.0, etc -->
```
Release Version: v4.0.0-beta.2-499-gc59cddcc0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: c59cddcc01e46adf4520d161f10a8e19bb58b785
Git Branch: master
UTC Build Time: 2020-05-22 07:35:25
GoVersion: go1.13.5
Race Enabled: false
TiKV Min Version: v3.0.0-60965b006877ca7234adaced7890d7b029ed1306
Check Table Before Drop: false
```

### 5. Root Cause Analysis

<!-- should be filled by the investigator before it's closed -->
pr_title: planner, expression: use expr.Clone() to create new ScalarFunction in EvaluateExprWithNull()
pr_body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #17475  <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

Here is a simple example:
```
create table t(a int, b float);
explain select * from t t1 left join t t2 on true where (t2.b or false) is null;
```

Before this PR, we may get the plan:
```
+------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+------------------------------------+
| id                           | estRows     | task      | access object | operator info                      |
+------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+------------------------------------+
| HashJoin_7                   | 64000000.00 | root      |               | CARTESIAN inner join               |
| ├─TableReader_14(Build)      | 8000.00     | root      |               | data:Selection_13                  |
| │ └─Selection_13             | 8000.00     | cop[tikv] |               | 1, isnull(or(istrue(test.t.b), 0)) |
| │   └─TableFullScan_12       | 10000.00    | cop[tikv] | table:t2      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo     |
| └─TableReader_11(Probe)      | 8000.00     | root      |               | data:Selection_10                  |
|   └─Selection_10             | 8000.00     | cop[tikv] |               | 1                                  |
|     └─TableFullScan_9        | 10000.00    | cop[tikv] | table:t1      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo     |
+------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+------------------------------------+
7 rows in set (0.01 sec)
```

We can see that we simplified the `left join` to `inner join` and push down the predicate `(t2.b or false) is null`, which is not right.
The root cause is that when we set `t2.b = null` to test whether `(t2.b or false) is null` returns false or null, the function `IsNullReject()` will return false. That is because when the function `EvaluateExprWithNull` creates a new `isTrue` expression, it will lose the value of `keepNull`(https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/3ab8f34110cb0259e662d2a7eb2c2e866cfb1e27/expression/builtin_op.go#L438).

After this PR:
```
mysql> explain select * from t t1 left join t t2 on true where (t2.b or false) is null;
+--------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------+
| id                             | estRows     | task      | access object | operator info                   |
+--------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------+
| Selection_7                    | 64000000.00 | root      |               | isnull(or(istrue(test.t.b), 0)) |
| └─HashJoin_8                   | 80000000.00 | root      |               | CARTESIAN left outer join       |
|   ├─TableReader_14(Build)      | 8000.00     | root      |               | data:Selection_13               |
|   │ └─Selection_13             | 8000.00     | cop[tikv] |               | 1                               |
|   │   └─TableFullScan_12       | 10000.00    | cop[tikv] | table:t2      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo  |
|   └─TableReader_11(Probe)      | 10000.00    | root      |               | data:TableFullScan_10           |
|     └─TableFullScan_10         | 10000.00    | cop[tikv] | table:t1      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo  |
+--------------------------------+-------------+-----------+---------------+---------------------------------+
7 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```
### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:

Use `expr.Clone()` to create new expression in `EvaluateExprWithNull` instead of use `NewFunctionInternal()`.

How it Works:

`expr.Clone()` can reserve the `keepNull` value of `IsTrue` expression.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Fix some scenarios that outer join might be mistakenly converted to inner join.
